creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #2)

Above, download.freebsd.org

The experience with a nearby mirror is comparable: 

<http://ftp.uk.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/VM-IMAGES/> 14.1 does not exist

<http://ftp.uk.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/CI-IMAGES/> 14.1 does not exist

<http://ftp.uk.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/14.1/> is present but not yet populated. 

I suspect that this is not a FreeBSD Mirror Admin issue. If so, I'm not sure which Bugzilla/Component will be better. 

Thanks
